name: Steve Schulkens
role: Award-winning TV producer, PR executive, and native New Orleanian
bio: Steve Schulkens is an award-winning TV producer and PR executive, and a native New Orleanian. He is a former TV/radio news reporter whose career has spanned decades in the media industry. He appeared on the show in Episode 15, '9 Lives.'

name: Ashley Morrison
bio: Ashley Morrison has served as a paramedic with West Jefferson EMS for 16 years.

name: Shawn Oddo
role: Owner of Valhalla Training Grounds and competitive bodybuilder
bio: Shawn Oddo is the owner of Valhalla Training Grounds and a competitive bodybuilder.

name: Jon McCarthy
role: Veteran paramedic, published author, comic creator
bio: Jon McCarthy is a veteran paramedic and the published author of 'Hard Roll.' He is also a comic creator.

name: Jourdan Blue
bio: Jourdan Blue is a musician and was a contestant on American Idol in 2021.

name: Dr. Ryan Estaris
bio: Dr. Ryan Estaris is a physician and public speaker who lives with ADHD.

name: Jude Blued
role: 50+ year radio broadcasting veteran and comedian
bio: Jude Blued is a radio broadcasting veteran with over 50 years in the industry, and a comedian.

name: The Joker of New Orleans
bio: The Joker of New Orleans is a street performer and mentalist based in New Orleans.

name: Theophile Bourgeois IV
role: Cajun Vista Fishing Lodge owner, filmmaker, tattoo artist, musician
bio: Theophile Bourgeois IV owns Cajun Vista Fishing Lodge and is a filmmaker, tattoo artist, and musician.

name: Alexander Steven Reyes
bio: Alexander Steven Reyes is a comedian and philanthropist.

name: Stale Kracker (Justin Chiasson)
role: Social media personality, retired State Trooper, CEO of Cajun 2 Step
bio: Justin Chiasson, known on social media as Stale Kracker, is a retired Louisiana State Trooper and the CEO of Cajun 2 Step.
